title: epidendrum fragrans var. aemulum
intro: Epidendrum fragrans var. aemulum, also known as the 'fragrant epidendrum', is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Epidendrum fragrans var. aemulum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
